task_description: Fix monster reserve tracking and display: show a 'no space' popup for Luna clan, properly track monsters returning to reserve (from battles/seppuku/betray), handle dual-type monsters counting toward secondary types, and update the sidebar to show X/Y (in reserve / total owned) format.

verification.summary: npx vite build passes cleanly. No formal tests in this project. Review issues addressed: Komainu temple detection, dead code removal, useMemo fix, code comments for intentional decisions.
